title: VillagerTalkedPayload
description: The enriched conversational fact, emitted by agent-service after deliberation chooses speech — distinct from ChatObserved (the raw world-bridge observation). Analytics and memory build on this one. Producer: agent-service on social.events.

listenerIds.description: Villagers the speaker believes are in earshot (from the world snapshot).

topic.description: Coarse conversational topic; 'smalltalk' until M1's enrichment.
